html:
2026-0178
2026-02-26ESDCBudget Implementation Act, 2023, No. 1Order Fixing April 1, 2026 as the Day on Which Certain Provisions of the Budget Implementation Act, 2023, No. 1 Come into Force Order Fixing April 1, 2026 as the day on which certain provisions of the Budget Implementation Act, 2023, No. 1 Come into Force in order to (1) prescribe that all new first appeals of Employment Insurance (EI) decisions made under the Employment Insurance Act are to be heard by the EI Board of Appeal (Board of Appeal) instead of the EI Section of the General Division of the Social Security Tribunal (the EI General Division of the SST); and (2) to make consequential amendments necessary for the replacement of the EI General Division of the SST by the Board of Appeal.N/A
subject: Order Fixing April 1, 2026 as the Day on Which Certain Provisions of the Budget Implementation Act, 2023, No. 1 Come into Force
precis: Order Fixing April 1, 2026 as the day on which certain provisions of the Budget Implementation Act, 2023, No. 1 Come into Force in order to (1) prescribe that all new first appeals of Employment Insurance (EI) decisions made under the Employment Insurance Act are to be heard by the EI Board of Appeal (Board of Appeal) instead of the EI Section of the General Division of the Social Security Tribunal (the EI General Division of the SST); and (2) to make consequential amendments necessary for the replacement of the EI General Division of the SST by the Board of Appeal.
